title: Opportunities for Suppliers with the Ministry of Defence

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Ministry of Defence (MOD) is inviting potential suppliers to explore opportunities for collaboration. A new leaflet has been released, detailing how businesses can engage with the MOD and become part of its supply chain.

This initiative highlights the MOD's commitment to working with various suppliers as part of its operational strategy. Such partnerships are vital for the ongoing development and sustainability of UK defence capabilities. HIAL airports connect communities across the Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a vital role since the inter-war period.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Promotional material: Find opportunities to become a supplier with the Ministry of Defence
